question: Does the generated image feature the square, clear glass perfume bottle from Image 1?
Is the gold text 'ETHEREAL' on the bottle correctly spelled and clearly legible?
Does the bottle display the gold ornate floral emblem consistent with Image 1?
Are the flowers in the image white roses matching the type and color in Image 2?
Is the background composed of beige/champagne silk fabric with a lustrous texture consistent with Image 3?
Is the perfume bottle positioned in the center of the image?
Are the roses disassembled into individual blooms and scattered petals, rather than appearing as a wrapped bouquet?
Are the rose blooms and petals distributed around the perfume bottle?
Is the brown wrapping paper and ribbon from Image 2 completely absent?
Does the lighting style resemble high-end commercial product photography (e.g., sharp highlights on glass, good contrast)?
Do the bottle, blooms, and petals cast realistic contact shadows onto the silk surface?
Does the glass bottle exhibit realistic transparency and refraction of the silk background behind it?
Is the bottle free from severe geometric distortions or warping?
Is the image free from unnatural artifacts (e.g., floating petals, glitchy textures, or duplicate text)?
Is the main subject (perfume bottle) in sharp focus?
